description_long: This is a long, modern bench with a dark brown, ribbed leather or leather-like seat and backrest, supported by a sturdy black metal frame. The seat is segmented into individual cushioned sections, providing both comfort and a visually striking pattern. The bench features a continuous backrest that extends the full length, with angled sides that enclose the seating area. The base consists of two wide, pedestal-style metal legs and a central support, ensuring stability and durability. The overall design is sleek and industrial, suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as transit stations, public waiting areas, or modern parks. The materials and construction suggest it is built for both comfort and resilience against frequent use.
description: A long, ribbed dark brown bench with a cushioned seat and backrest, supported by a black metal frame and pedestal legs. Its modern, industrial design is ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the ribbed seat and backrest, with the segmented cushions and black frame clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled side panel, the thickness of the cushioning, and the pedestal-style leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid backrest and the supporting metal frame and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the angled side panel and pedestal leg.
attribute_leg_design: pedestal base with central and side supports
